sqlReaderQuery.value:
select * from [dbo].[Tickets]
WHERE 
( TransactionDt > '@{activity('LookupOldWaterMarkActivity').output.firstRow.WatermarkValue}' OR '@{activity('LookupOldWaterMarkActivity').output.firstRow.WatermarkValue}'  IS NULL ) AND  TransactionDt <= '@{activity('LookupNewWaterMarkActivity').output.firstRow.NewWatermarkvalue}'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stg.ratings
